title: centranthus angustifolius var. rifanus
intro: Centranthus angustifolius var. rifanus, also known as Rif Mountain Valerian, is a plant species within the Valerianaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used for its sedative and antispasmodic effects. The plant is valued for its ability to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms associated with insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Rif Mountain Valerian include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a good night's sleep.
